title: Photograph of Abie Abraham's Signature on troop's flag.

title: Photograph of a buck skin jacket.
description: The jacket was given to a Butler boy when he was 4 years old. The jacket is believed to be of Seneca. The front has a seven pointed star or flower. The back has beavers on it along with the star/flower and some branches.
creator: Seneca Tribe
